ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the security */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the security during the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the security during the day */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the security */,
  "pre_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume of the security */,
  "p_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "atr21" REAL /* Average True Range (ATR) over the last 21 days */,
  "atr14" REAL /* Average True Range (ATR) over the last 14 days */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the associated security */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the security */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield as a percentage */,
  "volume_moving_average" REAL /* Moving average of trading volume over a certain period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Full name of the security */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol for the security */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector of the security */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the security is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the security is traded */,
  "isin_code" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cik_code" TEXT /* Central Index Key (for U.S. securities) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the security's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "trader_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., junior trader, senior trader) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the trader */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the firm */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the trader joined the firm */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the trader (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader conducting the session */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being traded during the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed during the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the trading session took place */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used for the trading session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for the session */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trading session in minutes */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_sessions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade order */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading session during which the order was placed */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share at which the order was placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade order (e.g., pending, executed, canceled) */,
  "order_fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade order */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the order was executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was executed */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the trade (if the order was executed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES trading_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated security */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., ATR, volatility) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric value */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period over which the metric is calculated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the performance metric */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the metric */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security related to the alert */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Value that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "user_notified" TEXT /* List of users who were notified about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, trader, analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its responsibilities */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the role */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user permission linkage */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the trader */,
  "permissions_json" TEXT /* JSON object containing detailed permissions */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the permissions become effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the permissions expire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trader_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader performing the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, trade placed) */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the action was performed */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trader_activity_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)
